title: South Africa Corporate Income Tax Return (ITR14) — Small Business pathway
description: File a South African company income tax return (ITR14) via SARS eFiling for a company classified as a 'Small Business' — a company with gross income (sales/turnover plus other income) not exceeding R20 million (R14 million for a financial year end prior to 20130430) and total assets (current and non-current) not exceeding R10 million, that is not otherwise classified as a Body Corporate/Share Block Company or Micro Business. The ITR14 is a dynamically customised return: the 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard first asks the filer to classify the company (dormant, share block company, body corporate, micro business, small business, or medium to large business), and SARS generates only the Annexure that classification requires. This document models Annexure D, the Small Business pathway (guide Section 14, pp.71-115): the Form Wizard questions (§14.1) and the Company/Close Corporation Particulars, Tax Practitioner Details, Declaration, Reportable Arrangement, Dividends Declared, Non-Residency, Personal Service Provider gate, Additional Assessment Information, Crypto Assets Transactions, Small Business Corporation (s12E), Urban Development Zone (s13quat), Company Structure, Multinational Entity (MNE) group, Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Tax Computation Debit/Credit Adjustment sections of the return itself (§14.2). Annexure D is structurally much larger than za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant, za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business, and za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-body-corporate (44 guide pages vs. 10-24 for those three): it has several sections with no counterpart in any of those three siblings — Small Business Corporation eligibility, Contributed Tax Capital, Urban Development Zone, Company Structure, Multinational Entity group details, Reportable Arrangement, Dividends Declared, Additional Assessment Information, and a much larger, separately-itemised Tax Computation Debit/Credit Adjustments block — and its own Balance Sheet and Income Statement carry materially more line items than the three siblings' shared, smaller containers. It deliberately does not model the repeating Share/Membership Register, Details of Beneficial Owner(s), Contributed Tax Capital (per class of share), Schedule of Local/Foreign Capital Gains and Losses, PAYE Credits Available (per-IRP5), Partnership/Joint Ventures detail, Donations-to-organisation detail list, Foreign Tax Credits (s6quat(1A)) computation container, Taxable Distributions from Trust(s) detail, or Details of Enhanced Renewable Energy Deduction (s12BA) containers — spec v0.3 has no repeating/nested field model (SPEC.md Section 12), the same limitation recorded in all three sibling ITR14 documents' VERIFICATION.md files. It also deliberately defers, as a whole, four large itemised 'pop-up selection box' Tax Computation sub-blocks that are each comparable in scope/complexity to a repeating container — 'Special Allowances Not Claimed in the Income Statement' (guide §14.2.22, ~84 individually selectable line items), 'Allowances/Deductions Granted in Previous Years of Assessment and now Reversed' (§14.2.24, ~9 items), 'Amounts Not Credited to the Income Statement' (§14.2.25, ~15 items), and 'Recoupment of Allowances/Expenses Previously Granted' (§14.2.26, ~12 items) — together with the downstream 'Tax Allowances/Limitations' confirmation-question decision tree (§14.2.28) and the 'Details of Enhanced Renewable Energy Deduction — s12BA' container (§14.2.27), both of which are themselves gated on fields inside the deferred Special Allowances block. It does model, in full, the two comparatively smaller and more directly enumerable Tax Computation blocks — 'Debit Adjustments: Non-Taxable Amounts Credited to the Income Statement' (§14.2.22, ~24 items) and 'Credit Adjustments: Non-Deductible Amounts Debited to the Income Statement' (§14.2.23, ~40 items) — as individually optional currency fields, since the guide states only the adjustments relevant to a given company need be selected and completed (unlike the Balance Sheet/Income Statement, whose fields the guide states are all compulsory with zero as the default). See VERIFICATION.md for the full scope rationale. It does not submit the return, compute tax payable, or determine any refund/assessment amount — the live SARS eFiling platform is always authoritative, and all SARS-calculated subtotal/control-total fields (e.g. Total Assets, Gross Profit/Loss, Net Profit/Loss, Calculated Profit/Loss before CFC income, and each section's Control Total) are deliberately excluded as fields, following this registry's established discipline (SPEC.md §16). imputedNetIncomeFromCfc is retained as the sole exception in that subsection, consistent with all three sibling documents, since the guide describes it as filer-entered (Source Code 4276), not calculated.

source.documentRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 (How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies — External Guide), Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026

verification.notes: GOV-1378 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle: CATALOG.md's 'Known Gaps & Opportunities' section (as updated by GOV-1282) explicitly named ZA SARS ITR14's Annexure D (Small Business, guide §14, pp.71-115) as 'the next natural candidate' after the three smaller Annexures (Dormant, Micro Business, Body Corporate/Share Block) were modelled. Authored from the same SARS 'How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies' External Guide used for those three sibling documents (IT-GEN-04-G01, Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026, fetched directly from sars.gov.za, HTTP 200, genuine text layer extracted in full with pdfjs-dist's getTextContent, no OCR needed) — this time reading Section 14 ('ANNEXURE D — SMALL BUSINESS', §§14.1-14.2, pp.71-115) in full. See VERIFICATION.md for the complete field-by-field provenance table, the full scope-cut rationale for every deferred repeating/large-itemised container, and the interpretive judgment calls flagged for an independent reviewer (notably: the Dormant/became-dormant-during-year branching logic at §14.1.2, the Debit/Credit Adjustment fields' required:false treatment departing from the compulsory-with-zero-default convention used for Balance Sheet/Income Statement fields, and the MNE reporting-entity Income Tax Number vs. Tax Identification Number fields' mutually-exclusive display logic, which is described in each field's own description rather than expressed as a requiredWhen condition since GSP-0013 has no string-equality-to-a-specific-country operator suited to this case without risking the notEquals-against-an-optional-field pitfall already documented in this registry's engineering notes). A mock conformance/za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-small-business/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run was independently checked with a from-scratch GSP-0013 condition evaluator — see VERIFICATION.md for the field/violation counts. Status remains 'draft' pending a live eFiling walkthrough, the same constraint recorded in all three sibling ITR14 documents' VERIFICATION.md files.

fields.name: companyClassification
fields.label: Company classification
fields.description: The company's classification, determined by the ITR14's 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard. This determines which Annexure (A-E) the return generates. This document models Annexure D (Small Business): a company with gross income (sales/turnover plus other income) not exceeding R20 million (R14 million for a financial year end prior to 20130430) and total assets (current and non-current) not exceeding R10 million, not otherwise classified as a Body Corporate/Share Block Company or Micro Business.
fields.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §14(a), §14.1.3(i) — 'Return Type... pre-populated... with one of the following return types: Dormant / Body Corporate/Share Block Company / Micro business / Small Company / Medium to Large Company'

fields.name: detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed
fields.label: Have the banking, public officer and contact details of the company been verified and confirmed as correct?
fields.description: If 'No', the ITR14 return cannot be requested; the legal entity information must first be updated via 'Maintain SARS Registered Details' on eFiling.

fields.name: publicOfficerCompliant
fields.label: Does the company confirm that the person appointed as public officer complies with the requirements of section 246 of the Tax Administration Act, 2011 (not removed for misconduct, not convicted of a relevant offence, tax compliant, and not disqualified from serving as director/office bearer/trustee)?
fields.description: Displayed once detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed is 'Yes'. Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isCompanyDormant
fields.label: Is the company dormant?
fields.description: Answering 'No' leads directly to the non-dormant Company Type questions. Answering 'Yes' leads to becameDormantDuringYear: if that is answered 'Yes', the company is still NOT regarded as dormant (it was trading for part of the year) and the Company Type questions display, matching this document's Small Business scope; if 'No', the company remains classified Dormant — out of scope for this document (see za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant).

fields.name: becameDormantDuringYear
fields.label: Did the company become dormant/inactive during the year of assessment?
fields.description: Only displayed if isCompanyDormant is 'Yes'. A 'Yes' answer here is the branch this document models (the company will not be regarded as a Dormant Company and Company Type will display); a 'No' answer instead displays the 'Specify the movement in assets, liabilities and/or reserves' question and keeps the company classified as Dormant — out of scope for this document.

fields.name: ceasedTradingDuringPeriod
fields.label: Did the company cease trading during this tax period?
fields.description: Displayed for all years of assessment once the company is not dormant (isCompanyDormant answered 'No').

fields.name: isCooperative
fields.label: Is the company a co-operative as defined in section 1 of the Income Tax Act?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards. Only one of the co-operative/association-of-persons/non-profit-company/collective-investment-scheme/body-corporate/share-block company-type questions may be answered 'Yes'.

fields.name: isAssociationOfPersons
fields.label: Is the company an association of persons as contemplated in paragraph (d) of the definition of 'company' in section 1?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isNonProfitCompany
fields.label: Is the company a non-profit company as defined in section 1 of the Companies Act?
fields.description: Called 'Is the company a non-profit company?' for the 2024 year of assessment and prior.

fields.name: isCollectiveInvestmentScheme
fields.label: Is the company a Collective Investment Scheme registered as a company?
fields.description: Re-asked verbatim within the Donations (S18A) wizard section to gate which Donations-allowable container the return displays (see wantsS18aDonationsDeduction).

fields.name: isBodyCorporateSectionalTitles
fields.label: Is the company a body corporate established in terms of the Sectional Titles Act, 1986?
fields.description: A 'Yes' here classifies the company under Annexure B (Body Corporate/Share Block), out of scope for this document — see za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-body-corporate.

fields.name: isShareBlockCompany
fields.label: Is the company a share block company as defined in the Share Blocks Control Act?
fields.description: A 'Yes' here classifies the company under Annexure B (Body Corporate/Share Block), out of scope for this document.

fields.name: doesCompanyHaveMembers
fields.label: Does the company have members?
fields.description: Only displayed if the company is an association of persons, a co-operative, or a non-profit company. If 'Yes', the Share/Membership Register container displays (out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: grossIncomeSalesTurnoverPlusOtherIncome
fields.label: Gross income (sales/turnover plus other income) in respect of the year of assessment (R)
fields.description: Calculated as the sum of 'Sales/Turnover' declared under Gross Profit/Loss and all income items declared under Income Items in the Income Statement. Must not exceed R20 million (financial year end on or after 20130430) or R14 million (prior) for a Small Business classification; if it does not exceed R1 million and total assets do not exceed R5 million, the company is instead classified Micro Business; if it exceeds R20 million and/or total assets exceed R10 million, the company is instead classified Medium to Large Business.

fields.name: totalAssetsCurrentAndNonCurrent
fields.label: Total assets (current and non-current) of the company in respect of the year of assessment (R)
fields.description: Must not exceed R10 million for a Small Business classification.

fields.name: hadLocalCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a locally sourced capital gain or loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Local Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadForeignCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a foreign sourced capital gain/loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Foreign Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadDebtReducedForNoConsideration
fields.label: Has any debt been reduced for no consideration which has the effect of reducing the company's assessed capital loss under paragraph 12A(4) of the Eighth Schedule?

fields.name: reductionForLocalAsset
fields.label: Was the reduction for a local asset?

fields.name: reductionForForeignAsset
fields.label: Was the reduction for a foreign asset?

fields.name: localDebtReductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of debt reduction — local assessed capital loss (R)
fields.description: Source code 4254. Programmatically reduces the Local Assessed Capital Loss Carry Over, limited to the amount available.

fields.name: foreignDebtReductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of debt reduction — foreign assessed capital loss (R)
fields.description: Source code 4255.

fields.name: relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme
fields.label: Does any declaration in this return relate to an application made under the SARS Voluntary Disclosure Programme?

fields.name: vdpApplicationNumber
fields.label: VDP application number issued by SARS
fields.description: Alphanumeric; the first three characters must be 'VDP'. No spaces or dashes. Must be for an approved VDP agreement between SARS and the company.

fields.name: isSmallBusinessCorporationS12E
fields.label: Is the company a Small Business Corporation as defined in section 12E?
fields.description: Not the same as a 'Small Business' return classification — s12E is a distinct, more restrictive tax status (natural-person shareholders only, gross income ceiling, personal-service/investment-income ceiling). If 'Yes', the Small Business Corporation section displays for completion.

fields.name: isQualifyingSezCompany
fields.label: Is the company a qualifying company as defined in section 12R (Special Economic Zones)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Special Economic Zones (SEZ) section displays for completion, including which SEZ(s) the company is located in and a series of mandatory qualification-confirmation questions — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: wantsS7fDeduction
fields.label: Does the company want to claim a deduction i.t.o. section 7F in respect of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E?

fields.name: s7fDeductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E (R)
fields.description: Source code 4052.

fields.name: wantsS18aDonationsDeduction
fields.label: Does the company want to claim donations made to an approved organisation in terms of section 18A?

fields.name: howManyOrganisationsDonatedTo
fields.label: How many organisations did the company donate to?
fields.description: The per-organisation name/PBO-number/amount detail (up to the top 20 by monetary value) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: totalAmountDonated
fields.label: Total amount donated during the year of assessment (R)
fields.description: Source code 4011. Subject to a 10% of taxable income limit under section 18A.

fields.name: averageValueOfParticipatoryInterests
fields.label: Average value of the aggregate of all participatory interests held by investors in the portfolio (R)

fields.name: wantsPayeCredits
fields.label: Will the company be claiming any PAYE credits reflected on an IRP5 tax certificate?
fields.description: For ITR14 returns from the 2019 form year onwards, PAYE credits cannot be manually captured — only pre-populated IRP5 information is accepted; additional IRP5 certificates require submission at a SARS branch.

fields.name: numberOfIrp5Certificates
fields.label: Number of IRP5 tax certificates
fields.description: SARS pre-populates this count. The per-certificate PAYE Credits Available container (non-taxable income, gross employment income, certificate number, PAYE credit) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: wantsForeignTaxCreditsS6quat1a
fields.label: Will the company be claiming any Foreign Tax credits not relating to Capital Gain transactions in terms of section 6quat(1A) and/or a treaty?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Foreign Tax Credits: Taxable Foreign Sourced Income of Resident Companies — section 6quat(1A) computation container displays — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadForeignTaxCreditsRefunded
fields.label: Were any foreign tax credits refunded/discharged during the year of assessment for which a rebate was allowed during a previous year of assessment in terms of section 6quin?

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedAllowedAsRebate
fields.label: Portion of the amount refunded/discharged that was previously allowed by SARS as a rebate (R)

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedAllowedAsS6quat1cDeduction
fields.label: Portion of the amount refunded/discharged that was previously allowed by SARS as a deduction in terms of section 6quat(1C) (R)
fields.description: Source code 4249.

fields.name: wantsS6quat1cDeduction
fields.label: Will the company be claiming a deduction on SA sourced trading income i.t.o. section 6quat(1C)?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: s6quat1cDeductionAmount
fields.label: Deduction i.t.o. section 6quat(1C) for foreign taxes paid or proved to be payable to a foreign government on any SA sourced trade income (R)
fields.description: Source code 4053.

fields.name: hadRightOfRecoveryOtherThanMap
fields.label: Did the company have a right of recovery (other than a right of recovery i.t.o. a mutual agreement procedure, or any entitlement to carry back losses arising during any previous year of assessment)?

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedDuringYear
fields.label: Was the foreign tax amount refunded to the company during this year of assessment?

fields.name: taxableIncomeFromSaSourcedTradeTaxedOutsideSa
fields.label: Taxable income from SA sourced trade income taxed outside SA, before considering section 18A/6quat(1C) deductions (R)
fields.description: This income must have been declared elsewhere in the return; the related deduction/carry-over is calculated by SARS. Applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: howManyClassesOfShares
fields.label: How many different classes of shares have been issued by the company?
fields.description: Accepts numeric values between 1 and 100. Based on the value entered, the Contributed Tax Capital and Share/Membership Register containers repeatedly display for completion — both out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md) — unless isResidentInSouthAfrica is 'No', in which case only the Share/Membership Register displays (foreign companies are not expected to complete the Contributed Tax Capital container). Re-asked at §14.1.11(d) (as 1-99, when isListedOnRecognisedStockExchange is 'Yes') and §14.1.11(e)(ii)(A) (as 1-100, when isResidentInSouthAfrica is 'Yes') — modelled here as the single underlying field.

fields.name: isPartnerInPartnership
fields.label: Is the company a partner in a partnership/joint venture?

fields.name: howManyPartnershipsJointVentures
fields.label: How many partnerships/joint ventures?
fields.description: The repeating Partnership/Joint Ventures container (Partnership Name, profit/loss sharing %, profit-or-loss indicator, local-or-foreign indicator, one section per partnership) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: isPersonalServiceProvider
fields.label: Is the company a Personal Service Provider as defined in the Fourth Schedule?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Personal Service Provider section displays — a decision-tree questionnaire out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Section 23(k) prohibits a Personal Service Provider from deducting certain listed expenses.

fields.name: isListedOnRecognisedStockExchange
fields.label: Is the company listed on a recognised stock exchange as referred to in paragraph 1 of the Eighth Schedule?

fields.name: isResidentInSouthAfrica
fields.label: Is the company resident in South Africa for income tax purposes?

fields.name: hadCryptoAssetTransactionsExcludingCgt
fields.label: Did the company have transactions (including mining activities) relating to crypto assets (excluding CGT)?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: howManyBeneficialOwners
fields.label: How many beneficial owners does the company have?
fields.description: Zero (0) is allowed where no natural person ultimately owns or exercises effective control over the company. If greater than zero, the Details of Beneficial Owner(s) container displays, repeated per owner — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: qualifiesForUdzDeductionS13quat
fields.label: Did the company qualify for an Urban Development Zone deduction (s13quat)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Urban Development Zone (s13quat) section displays for completion. For companies with a financial year end of 04 to 12, not displayed from the 2026 tax year onwards.

fields.name: enteredReportableArrangement
fields.label: Did the company enter into any reportable arrangement in terms of s34-39 of the Tax Administration Act or s80M-s80T?

fields.name: numberOfReportableArrangements
fields.label: Number of reportable arrangements
fields.description: Accepts numeric values between 1 and 100. The per-arrangement 'Specify the reportable arrangement number' repeating field is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: wereDividendsDeclared
fields.label: Were any dividends declared during the year of assessment?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Dividends Declared section displays for completion.

fields.name: isPartOfGroupPreparingConsolidatedFinancialStatements
fields.label: Is the company part of a group of companies that prepares consolidated financial statements?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Company Structure section displays for completion. Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isMemberOfMneGroup
fields.label: Is the company a member of a Multinational Entity (MNE) group as defined in the Country-by-Country (CbC) Regulations?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Multinational Entity (MNE) group details section displays for completion.

fields.name: isRegisteredForCustoms
fields.label: Is the company registered/licensed for customs purposes?

fields.name: numberOfCustomsClientCodes
fields.label: Number of customs client codes allocated to this company

fields.name: taxReferenceNumber
fields.label: Tax reference number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The company's SARS income tax reference number. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: yearOfAssessment
fields.label: Year of assessment
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: registeredName
fields.label: Registered name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: tradingName
fields.label: Trading name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: companyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Company/CC registration number
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: financialYearEnd
fields.label: Financial year-end
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: isReturnForForeignBranchOrAgency
fields.label: Is this return in respect of a branch/permanent establishment/agency of a foreign company?

fields.name: provinceOfMajorityIncome
fields.label: Where the majority of the company's taxable income/loss is derived from
fields.description: The nine South African provinces plus 'International'.

fields.name: standardIndustryCode
fields.label: Standard Industry Code (SIC) applicable to the main activity of the company
fields.description: Selected from the Standard Industry Codes booklet published at www.statssa.gov.za.

fields.name: profitCodeMainSource
fields.label: Profit code of the main source of income
fields.description: Selected from SARS' main source code list. Note (§14.2.1(b)(iv)): if the company is dormant this field is pre-populated with code 9994 and locked — inapplicable to this document's scope (isCompanyDormant is not the still-dormant branch).

fields.name: profitCodeOtherDescription
fields.label: Description, if the profit code of the main source of income is 'other not specified'
fields.description: Mandatory free-text field (maximum 56 characters) only if the selected profit code ends with '98'. Not expressible as a requiredWhen condition on profitCodeMainSource's own value under GSP-0013 (no string-suffix operator) — left optional here; a filer/agent must supply it whenever that condition holds.

fields.name: isTaxPractitionerFiling
fields.label: Return completed by a registered tax practitioner
fields.description: Inferred gating field: guide §14.2.2 is headed 'TAX PRACTITIONER DETAILS (If Applicable)' but the Annexure D wizard text does not show an explicit Yes/No question for it — applicability is most likely determined by the logged-in eFiling user's practitioner-registered role rather than an in-form question, the same caveat recorded for all three sibling ITR14 documents.

fields.name: taxPractitionerRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner registration number
fields.description: Alphanumeric, 9 characters; the first two characters must be 'PR'.

fields.name: taxPractitionerTelNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner telephone number
fields.description: Numeric field, up to 15 characters.

fields.name: taxPractitionerNoEmailDeclared
fields.label: Mark here with an 'X' if you declare that you do not have an email address
fields.description: If marked, the Tax Practitioner Email address field is locked and greyed out.

fields.name: taxPractitionerEmailAddress
fields.label: Tax practitioner email address
fields.description: Free text, up to 52 characters.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Declaration date
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. The Company Representative/Public Officer's eFiling login serves as authentication for submission; if submitted at a SARS branch, the signature pad is signed instead.

fields.name: hasRoundTripFinancingS80d
fields.label: Is the company a participant in any arrangements with round trip financing (s80D)?

fields.name: hasOffsettingElementsS80c
fields.label: Is the company a participant in any arrangements with elements that have the effect of offsetting or cancelling each other (s80C)?

fields.name: hasAccommodatingPartyS80e
fields.label: Is the company a participant in any arrangements with the presence of an accommodating or tax-indifferent party (s80E)?

fields.name: totalDividendsSubjectToStc
fields.label: Total dividends subject to STC (dividends declared before 1 April 2012) (R)
fields.description: All currency fields in this section must be completed; complete zero (0) if not applicable to the company.

fields.name: totalDividendsSubjectToDividendsTax
fields.label: Total dividends subject to dividends tax (dividends declared and paid on or after 1 April 2012) (R)

fields.name: totalDividendsExemptFromDividendsTax
fields.label: Total dividends exempt from dividends tax (R)

fields.name: totalDividendsSubjectToDoubleTaxationRelief
fields.label: Total dividends subject to double taxation relief (R)

fields.name: totalDividendsInSpecieDeclared
fields.label: Total dividends in specie declared (R)

fields.name: nonResidentDueToForeignIncorporation
fields.label: Is the company resident outside South Africa due to foreign incorporation (and not being effectively managed in SA)?

fields.name: nonResidentDueToTaxTreaty
fields.label: Is the company resident outside South Africa by virtue of a treaty to avoid double taxation?

fields.name: dateCeasedToBeResident
fields.label: Date on which the company ceased to be a resident
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD.

fields.name: consentToProvideFinancialStatementsToCipc
fields.label: Does the company give consent that SARS can provide the attached financial statements to the Companies and Intellectual Property Commission (CIPC)?

fields.name: financialStatementsAudited
fields.label: Have the financial statements been audited?

fields.name: financialStatementsReviewed
fields.label: Have the financial statements been reviewed?
fields.description: 'No' can be selected to both this question and financialStatementsAudited.

fields.name: nameOfAuditorOrReviewer
fields.label: Name of the entity that conducted the audit/review

fields.name: financialStatementsQualified
fields.label: Have the financial statements been qualified?

fields.name: qualifiedOpinionHasTaxEffect
fields.label: Does the qualified opinion have any tax effect?

fields.name: hadGainOrLossFromEarlyTerminationOfForeignInstrument
fields.label: Did the company generate a capital gain/loss or revenue gain/loss in respect of the early termination of a foreign instrument?

fields.name: receivedReturnOfCapital
fields.label: Did the company receive a return of capital or a foreign return of capital subject to paragraph 76B of the Eighth Schedule?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Local or Foreign Capital Gains Tax container displays — out of scope for this document (see hadLocalCapitalGainOrLoss/hadForeignCapitalGainOrLoss and VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: prematurelyTerminatedHedgePosition
fields.label: Did the company prematurely terminate/unwind a hedge position where the tax value differs in relation to the economic value?

fields.name: enteredSaleAndLeasebackAgreement
fields.label: Did the company enter into any sale and leaseback agreement?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isBeneficiaryOfTrust
fields.label: Is the company a beneficiary of a trust?

fields.name: howManyTrusts
fields.label: How many trusts is the company a beneficiary of?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: receivedDistributionFromTrust
fields.label: Did the company receive any distribution(s) from a trust(s) during this year of assessment (amount distributed to/vested in the company, or deemed to have accrued in terms of s7)?

fields.name: numberOfTrustsForDistributions
fields.label: Number of trusts applicable to distributions received
fields.description: Accepts a number between 1 and 99. The 'Taxable Distribution(s) from all Trust(s)' repeating container (trust name, registration number, tax reference number, local/foreign CGT distribution, local/foreign taxable income distribution) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: exercisedControlOfTrust
fields.label: Did the company exercise any control of a trust?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isFounderSettlorBeneficiaryOfForeignTrust
fields.label: Is the company a founder/settlor/beneficiary of a foreign trust?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: madeDonationsToForeignTrust
fields.label: Did the company make any donations to a foreign trust?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isReit
fields.label: Is the company a REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) as defined in s1?
fields.description: Mandatory from the 2014 year of assessment onwards; optional for prior years.

fields.name: soldGoodsOrServicesOnline
fields.label: Did the company sell goods or services online?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: participatedInFarmingActivities
fields.label: Did the company participate in any farming activities?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards. If 'Yes', a note directs the filer to upload the required farming schedule as part of the return submission — the schedule upload itself is out of scope for this document.

fields.name: farmingScheduleParagraph
fields.label: Paragraph of the First Schedule to the Income Tax Act which applies to this assessment (if any)
fields.description: Only applicable if participatedInFarmingActivities is 'Yes'; the guide itself frames this as optional ('if any'), so it is not gated with requiredWhen.

fields.name: carriesOnBankingFinancialServicesInsuranceBusiness
fields.label: Is the company carrying on banking, financial services or insurance business?

fields.name: isCoveredPersonS24jb
fields.label: Is the company a 'covered person' as envisaged in paragraph (c)(i) to (iii) and (d) of that definition in s24JB?
fields.description: Determines whether 'Allowance i.r.o. impairments (s11(jA))' or the separate IFRS-applied/IFRS-not-applied doubtful debt allowance fields are available in the (deferred) Special Allowances Not Claimed and Allowances/Deductions Reversed containers.

fields.name: isPartOfGroupOfCompaniesS1
fields.label: Is the company part of a group of companies as defined in s1?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards. Distinct from isPartOfGroupPreparingConsolidatedFinancialStatements, which gates the Company Structure section.

fields.name: isPartOfMultinationalEnterprise
fields.label: Is the company part of a multinational enterprise?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2017 year of assessment onwards. Distinct from isMemberOfMneGroup, which gates the Multinational Entity (MNE) group details section under the Country-by-Country Regulations.

fields.name: enteredPotentiallyAffectedTransactionsExceedingR100m
fields.label: Did the company enter into potentially affected transactions exceeding an aggregate value of R100 million for the year of assessment (Public Notice No. 1117, GG No. 41186 of 20 October 2017)?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: financialYearEndChangedDuringYear
fields.label: Did the financial year end of the company change during this year of assessment?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: fyeChangePeriodStartDate
fields.label: Start date of the financial statement period used for the completion of this return
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. From the 2019 year of assessment onwards. Only one ITR14 return should be submitted for this period.

fields.name: fyeChangePeriodEndDate
fields.label: End date of the financial statement period used for the completion of this return
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD.

fields.name: isSarsApprovedVentureCapitalCompanyS12j
fields.label: Is the company a SARS approved Venture Capital Company as defined in s12J?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isQualifyingCompanyS12j
fields.label: Is the company a qualifying company as defined in s12J?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isOilAndGasCompany
fields.label: Is the company an Oil and Gas Company as defined in the Tenth Schedule?
fields.description: Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: hasDifferentTaxRateForOilAndGas
fields.label: Does a different tax rate apply to the company and/or any right(s) held by that company?

fields.name: cryptoAssetsIncludedInIncomeStatement
fields.label: Were any transactions relating to crypto assets included in the income statement?

fields.name: grossCryptoAssetsAmountInIncomeStatement
fields.label: Gross crypto assets amount included in income statement (R)

fields.name: cryptoAssetTransactionsResultedInProfit
fields.label: Did the transaction(s) relating to crypto assets result in a profit?

fields.name: cryptoAssetsProfitAmount
fields.label: Profit relating to crypto assets trading (R)

fields.name: cryptoAssetsLossAmount
fields.label: Loss relating to crypto assets trading (R)

fields.name: amountOfCryptoAssetsInBalanceSheet
fields.label: Amount of crypto assets included as assets in the Balance Sheet (R)

fields.name: sbcGrossIncome
fields.label: Gross income, as defined in s1, of the company (for Small Business Corporation eligibility) (R)
fields.description: Must not exceed R14 million (financial year end prior to 20130430) or R20 million (on or after); otherwise the company does not qualify as a Small Business Corporation.

fields.name: sbcDeclarationInvestmentAndPersonalServiceIncomeUnder20Percent
fields.label: Does the company declare that not more than 20% of the total of all receipts and accruals (other than of a capital nature) and all capital gains consists collectively of investment income and income from rendering a personal service?
fields.description: If 'No', the company will not be regarded as a Small Business Corporation.

fields.name: sbcDeclarationNotPersonalServiceProvider
fields.label: Does the company declare that the company is not a Personal Service Provider as defined in the Fourth Schedule?

fields.name: sbcDeclarationAllShareholdersNaturalPersons
fields.label: Does the company declare that all of the shareholders/members were natural persons (individuals) throughout the year of assessment?

fields.name: sbcDeclarationNoCrossHoldingsInOtherEntities
fields.label: Does the company declare that none of the shareholders/members of the company held shares/interests in another close corporation, company or co-operative other than those specified in s12E(4)(a)(ii)?

fields.name: udzBuildingInApprovedDemarcatedZone
fields.label: Is the building for which the company is claiming an allowance in an approved demarcated zone?
fields.description: If 'No', an error message displays and the Urban Development Zone (s13quat) question in the wizard must be updated.

fields.name: udzReceivedMunicipalCertificate
fields.label: Did the company receive a certificate issued by the municipality confirming that the building is in an urban development zone?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the certificate must be kept for 5 years per s29 of the Tax Administration Act.

fields.name: udzErectedForPurposeOfImmediateDisposal
fields.label: Did the company erect, extend, add or improve the building for which an allowance is claimed with the sole purpose of disposing thereof directly on completion?
fields.description: If 'Yes', an error message displays and the wizard question must be updated.

fields.name: udzTotalAmountIncurredErectionExtensionImprovement
fields.label: Total amount incurred for the erection, extension, addition or improvement of the building (R)

fields.name: udzPurchasedBuildingFromDeveloper
fields.label: Did the company purchase the building or part thereof from a developer?

fields.name: udzPurchasePrice
fields.label: Purchase price of the building or part thereof (R)

fields.name: udzCostDeemedIncurredS13quat3B
fields.label: Amount of the purchase price deemed to be cost incurred by the company in terms of s13quat(3B) (R)

fields.name: udzUsedSolelyForTradeDuringYear
fields.label: Did the company use the building erected, extended, improved or added on to solely for the trade of the company during the year of assessment?
fields.description: If 'No', an error message displays and the wizard question must be updated.

fields.name: udzIncurredLowCostHousingCosts
fields.label: Did the company incur costs for the erection, extension or addition relating to low-cost housing (s13quat(3A))?
fields.description: If 'No', the two low-cost-residential-unit UDZ currency fields (deferred as part of the Special Allowances Not Claimed container — see VERIFICATION.md) must be zero.

fields.name: ultimateHoldingEntityName
fields.label: Name of the ultimate holding company (or, if the ultimate holding entity is a trust, the name of the trust)

fields.name: ultimateHoldingEntityRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Company/CC/Trust registration number of the ultimate holding entity
fields.description: A group organogram with the correct Group Structure information must be uploaded as a supporting document with the return — out of scope for this document as a repeating/free-form document.

fields.name: isUltimateHoldingCompanyResidentOutsideSA
fields.label: Is the ultimate holding company resident outside South Africa?

fields.name: ultimateHoldingCompanyTaxResidencyCountryCode
fields.label: Tax residency country code of the ultimate holding company

fields.name: ultimateHoldingCompanyIncomeTaxReferenceNumber
fields.label: Income tax reference number of the ultimate holding company

fields.name: isPartnerInUnincorporatedJointVenture
fields.label: Is the company a partner in an unincorporated joint venture?

fields.name: isPartOfGroupWithConsolidatedTurnoverOverR1Billion
fields.label: Is the company part of a group of companies with a group consolidated turnover greater than R1 billion?

fields.name: mneReportingEntityTaxJurisdiction
fields.label: Tax jurisdiction of the reporting entity of the CbC Report for the MNE Group
fields.description: Selected from a country dropdown (guide's Annexure F list of valid country names).

fields.name: mneReportingEntityName
fields.label: Name of the reporting entity

fields.name: mneReportingEntityIncomeTaxNumber
fields.label: Income Tax number of the reporting entity
fields.description: Only displayed if 'South Africa' is selected as mneReportingEntityTaxJurisdiction; introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards. Modelled as optional rather than a requiredWhen-gated field since GSP-0013 has no equals-a-specific-country-string operator that safely avoids the notEquals-against-an-optional-field pitfall documented in this registry's engineering notes; mneReportingEntityIncomeTaxNumber and mneReportingEntityTaxIdentificationNumber are mutually exclusive depending on that jurisdiction selection.

fields.name: mneReportingEntityTaxIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Tax Identification number of the reporting entity
fields.description: Only displayed if the reporting entity's tax jurisdiction is any country other than South Africa; introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards. See mneReportingEntityIncomeTaxNumber's description for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: mneReportingEntityRole
fields.label: Whether the reporting entity is the ultimate parent entity or a surrogate parent entity
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: mneGroupReportingFiscalYearEnd
fields.label: Reporting fiscal year end of the MNE Group
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsPropertyPlantEquipment
fields.label: Non-current assets — Property, plant and equipment (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable. Use figures from the company's own (not group/consolidated) annual financial statements, in Rands with no cents.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsVehicles
fields.label: Non-current assets — Vehicles (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2016 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsInvestmentsInAssociatesAndJointVentures
fields.label: Non-current assets — Investments in associates and joint ventures (R)

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsLongTermLoansInterestBearing
fields.label: Non-current assets — Long term loans, interest bearing (R)

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsLongTermLoansInterestFree
fields.label: Non-current assets — Long term loans, interest free (R)

fields.name: otherNonCurrentAssets
fields.label: Other non-current assets (R)

fields.name: otherNonCurrentAssetsDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other non-current assets
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherNonCurrentAssets.

fields.name: currentAssetsInventoryWorkInProgress
fields.label: Current assets — Inventory and work in progress, net after provisions (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsTradeAndOtherReceivables
fields.label: Current assets — Trade and other receivables (excl. debtors), net after provisions (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsDebtorsExcludingTrade
fields.label: Current assets — Debtors (excl. trade debtors) (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsCashAndCashEquivalents
fields.label: Current assets — Cash and cash equivalents (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsShortTermInvestments
fields.label: Current assets — Short-term investments (R)

fields.name: otherCurrentAssets
fields.label: Other current assets (R)

fields.name: otherCurrentAssetsDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other current assets
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherCurrentAssets.

fields.name: nonDistributableReserves
fields.label: Capital and Reserves — Non-distributable reserves (R)
fields.description: A debit balance (assessed loss) is entered as a negative value (e.g. -10000); a credit balance is entered as a positive value.

fields.name: otherCapitalAndReserves
fields.label: Capital and Reserves — Other capital and reserves (R)
fields.description: A debit balance (assessed loss) is entered as a negative value; a credit balance is entered as a positive value.

fields.name: otherCapitalAndReservesDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other capital and reserves
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherCapitalAndReserves.

fields.name: nonCurrentLiabilitiesLongTermLoan
fields.label: Non-Current Liabilities — Long-term loan (R)

fields.name: otherNonCurrentLiabilities
fields.label: Other non-current liabilities (R)

fields.name: otherNonCurrentLiabilitiesDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other non-current liabilities
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherNonCurrentLiabilities.

fields.name: currentLiabilitiesTradeAndOtherPayables
fields.label: Current Liabilities — Trade and other payables, including accruals (R)

fields.name: currentLiabilitiesOverdraftAndInterestBearingShortTermBorrowings
fields.label: Current Liabilities — Overdraft and interest-bearing short-term borrowings (R)

fields.name: otherCurrentLiabilities
fields.label: Other current liabilities (R)

fields.name: otherCurrentLiabilitiesDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other current liabilities
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherCurrentLiabilities.

fields.name: salesTurnover
fields.label: Gross Profit/Loss — Sales (turnover) (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable. Use the normal accounting meaning of the terms used; if the company has no cost of sales (e.g. a property rental company), turnover and gross profit will be the same amount.

fields.name: plusClosingStock
fields.label: Gross Profit/Loss — Plus: Closing stock (R)

fields.name: lessPurchases
fields.label: Gross Profit/Loss — Less: Purchases (R)

fields.name: lessOpeningStock
fields.label: Gross Profit/Loss — Less: Opening stock (R)

fields.name: accountingProfitOnDisposalOfAssetsIncome
fields.label: Income items — Accounting profit on disposal of fixed assets and/or other assets (R)

fields.name: adminManagementSecretarialRentalsIncome
fields.label: Income items — Admin, Management, secretarial, rentals (R)

fields.name: dividendsInSpecieS8fS8faIncome
fields.label: Income items — Amounts deemed to be dividends in specie (s8F and s8FA) (R)

fields.name: badAndDoubtfulDebtsRecovered
fields.label: Income items — Bad and doubtful debts recovered (R)

fields.name: dividendsDeemedIncomeS8eS8ea
fields.label: Income items — Dividends (local and foreign) deemed to be income (s8E and s8EA) (R)

fields.name: taintedDividendsDeemedIncomeS22b
fields.label: Income items — Tainted dividends (local and foreign) deemed to be income (s22B) (R)

fields.name: dividendsReceived
fields.label: Income items — Dividends received (R)

fields.name: levyIncome
fields.label: Income items — Levy income (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: governmentGrantsIncome
fields.label: Income items — Government grants (national, provincial and local) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeGainIncome
fields.label: Income items — Foreign exchange gain (R)

fields.name: insuranceProceedsReceived
fields.label: Income items — Insurance proceeds received (R)

fields.name: interestExcludingSarsInterest
fields.label: Income items — Interest, excluding SARS interest (s7E) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: sarsInterestS7e
fields.label: Income items — SARS Interest (s7E) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards. SARS pre-populates based on any IT3(b) certificate(s); can be amended upward but not reduced.

fields.name: reitDistributionsReceived
fields.label: Income items — REIT distribution received (R)

fields.name: inclusionInGrossIncomeMiningCompanyParJ
fields.label: Income items — Inclusion in Gross Income of a mining company in terms of paragraph (j) (R)

fields.name: otherIncomeItems
fields.label: Income items — Other income (R)

fields.name: otherIncomeItemsDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other income
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherIncomeItems.

fields.name: accountingLossOnDisposalOfAssetsExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Accounting loss on disposal of fixed assets/other assets (R)

fields.name: adminManagementSecretarialFeesExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Admin, Management, secretarial fees, rentals (R)

fields.name: alterationsAndImprovementsExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Alterations and improvements (R)

fields.name: badDebtsWrittenOff
fields.label: Expense items — Bad debts written off (R)

fields.name: consultingLegalProfessionalFees
fields.label: Expense items — Consulting, legal, and professional fees (R)

fields.name: depreciationExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Depreciation (R)

fields.name: directorsMembersRemuneration
fields.label: Expense items — Directors'/members' remuneration (R)

fields.name: donationsS18aExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Donations (s18A) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards. When completed, pre-populates and locks the matching 'Donations (s18A)' add-back field in Tax Computation.

fields.name: donationsOtherExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Donations, other (R)
fields.description: Mandatory from the 2015 year of assessment onwards; complete zero if no donations were made. When completed, pre-populates and locks the matching 'Donations — Other' add-back field in Tax Computation.

fields.name: soilErosionExpenditureS17a
fields.label: Expense items — Expenditure incurred by a lessor of land let for farming purposes in respect of soil erosion (s17A) (R)

fields.name: interestPaidExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Interest paid (R)

fields.name: provisionForDoubtfulDebts
fields.label: Expense items — Provision for doubtful debts (R)

fields.name: repairsAndMaintenance
fields.label: Expense items — Repairs and maintenance (R)

fields.name: salariesAndWages
fields.label: Expense items — Salaries and Wages (incl. Medical, Pension and Provident Fund Contributions) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Foreign Exchange Loss (R)

fields.name: sarsInterestRepaidS7fExpense
fields.label: Expense items — SARS interest repaid (s7F) (R)

fields.name: travellingExpenses
fields.label: Expense items — Travelling expenses (R)

fields.name: otherExpenseItems
fields.label: Expense items — Other expenses (excluding expenses listed above) (R)

fields.name: otherExpenseItemsDescription
fields.label: Description relating to other expenses
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherExpenseItems.

fields.name: accountingInterestReceivedReceivableAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment (non-taxable amount credited to the Income Statement) — Accounting interest received/receivable (R)
fields.description: Only completed where the adjustment is applicable to the company; on eFiling and in the branch, a pop-up selection box displays from which only relevant adjustments are selected and completed (unlike the Balance Sheet/Income Statement, whose fields are all compulsory with zero as default).

fields.name: accountingProfitOnDisposalAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Accounting profit on disposal of fixed and/or other assets (R)

fields.name: ifrsAdjustmentAccountingAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Adjustments to comply with IFRS: Accounting (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2006 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: ifrsAdjustmentFairValueAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Adjustments to comply with IFRS: Fair value (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2006 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: amountsPreviouslyTaxedAsReceivedInAdvance
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Amounts previously taxed as received in advance (R)

fields.name: dividendsInSpecieAllowableS8fS8fa
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Amounts deemed to be dividends in specie (s8F and s8FA) (R)

fields.name: exemptLocalDividends
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exempt local dividends (R)

fields.name: exemptForeignDividendsS10_1_k_ii
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exempt foreign dividends (s10(1)(k)(ii)) (R)

fields.name: exemptIncomeMiningRehabilitationS10_1_cP
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Income exempt in respect of mining rehabilitation company (s10(1)(cP)) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: exemptionS10_1_t
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exemption in terms of s10(1)(t) (R)

fields.name: exemptionS10_1_yA
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exemption in terms of s10(1)(yA) (R)

fields.name: fruitlessAndWastefulExpenditureAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Fruitless and Wasteful expenditure (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards, applicable to entities subject to the Public Finance Management Act, 1999.

fields.name: otherIncomeExemptS10_1NotElsewhere
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Other Income exempt from tax i.t.o. s10(1) not included elsewhere (R)

fields.name: exemptForeignDividendsS10b
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exempt foreign dividends (s10B) (R)

fields.name: exemptionFilmsS12o
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exemption in respect of films (s12O) (R)
fields.description: Moved to this section from the 2016 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: exemptGovernmentGrantsS12p
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Exempt income received or accrued in respect of government grants (s12P) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: incomeExemptShipsInternationalShippingS12q
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Income exempt in respect of ships used for international shipping (s12Q) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: foreignExchangeGainAdjustmentS24i
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Foreign exchange gain adjustment (s24I, excluding s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: foreignCurrencyTranslationAdjustmentS25d
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Foreign currency translation adjustment (s25D) (R)

fields.name: incomeNotTaxableDoubleTaxationAgreement
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Income not taxable by virtue of double taxation agreement (R)

fields.name: mineralPetroleumRoyaltyAdjustmentAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Mineral and Petroleum Resources Royalty adjustment (R)

fields.name: receiptsAccrualsOfCapitalNature
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Receipts and/or accruals of a capital nature (R)

fields.name: reversalOfProvisionsAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Reversal of provisions (R)

fields.name: otherAdjustmentsAllowable
fields.label: Debit adjustment — Other (excluding items listed above) (R)

fields.name: otherAdjustmentsAllowableDescription
fields.label: Description relating to 'other' debit adjustments consolidated above
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherAdjustmentsAllowable; on eFiling/branch, only displays if 'Other' was checked on the selection list.

fields.name: accountingInterestPaidPayableAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment (non-deductible amount debited to the Income Statement) — Accounting interest paid/payable (R)
fields.description: Only completed where the adjustment is applicable to the company; on eFiling and in the branch, a pop-up selection box displays from which only relevant adjustments are selected and completed.

fields.name: accountingLossesForeignSourcesExcludingCfcAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Accounting losses derived from foreign sources (excluding CFC) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2000 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: accountingLossOnDisposalAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Accounting loss on disposal of fixed and/or other assets (R)

fields.name: ifrsAdjustmentAccountingAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Adjustments to comply with IFRS: Accounting (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2006 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: ifrsAdjustmentFairValueAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Adjustments to comply with IFRS: Fair value (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2006 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: mineralPetroleumRoyaltyAdjustmentAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Mineral and Petroleum Resources Royalty adjustment (R)

fields.name: amortisationLeasePremiumsLeaseholdImprovementsAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Amortisation of lease premiums and improvements to leasehold premises (R)

fields.name: capitalExpenditureAndOrLossesAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Capital expenditure and/or losses (R)

fields.name: depreciationAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Depreciation according to financial statements (R)

fields.name: expensesAttributableToExemptIncomeLocalAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Expenses attributable to exempt income — Local (R)

fields.name: expensesAttributableToExemptIncomeForeignAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Expenses attributable to exempt income — Foreign (R)

fields.name: interestPaidCapitalisedLeasedAssetsAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Interest paid in respect of capitalised leased assets (R)

fields.name: interestClaimedExceedingInterestReceivedS11gAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Interest claimed exceeding interest received (not linked to trading) (s11G) (R)

fields.name: lumpSumContributionsRetirementBenefitFundsAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Lump sum contributions to retirement and/or benefit funds (R)

fields.name: provisionForDoubtfulDebtNotDeductibleAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Provision for doubtful debt not deductible in current year (R)

fields.name: provisionsNotDeductibleExcludingDoubtfulDebtAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Provisions not deductible current year (excluding doubtful debt) (R)

fields.name: dividendsInSpecieAddBackS8fS8fa
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Amounts deemed to be dividends in specie (s8F and s8FA) (R)

fields.name: expensesNotIncurredInProductionOfIncomeS11aAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Expenses not actually incurred in the production of income (s11(a)) (R)

fields.name: soilErosionLimitationS17aAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Limitation of expenditure incurred by lessor of land for farming purposes in respect of soil erosion (s17A) (R)

fields.name: donationsS18aAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Donations (s18A) (R)
fields.description: Pre-populated from donationsS18aExpense and locked (see VERIFICATION.md); retained as a field per this registry's precedent for declared pre-filled values.

fields.name: donationsOtherAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Donations, other (R)
fields.description: Pre-populated from donationsOtherExpense and locked (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: deductionsNotAllowableS23AddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Deductions not allowable in determination of taxable income (s23) (R)

fields.name: fruitlessAndWastefulExpenditureAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Fruitless and Wasteful expenditure (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards, applicable to entities subject to the Public Finance Management Act, 1999.

fields.name: saleAndLeasebackAmountsS23gAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Amounts in respect of assets subject to a sale and leaseback arrangement (s23G) (R)

fields.name: prepaidExpenditureNotAllowedS23hAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Prepaid expenditure not allowed under s23H (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2000 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: taintedIntellectualPropertyS23iAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Amounts in respect of certain (tainted) intellectual property (s23I) (R)

fields.name: interestNonDeductibleS23kAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Interest non-deductible in terms of s23K (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2011 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: shortTermInsurancePremiumsNotAllowableS23lAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Short term insurance policy premiums not allowable (s23L) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: interestNotAllowableDebtsOwedToPersonsNotSubjectToTaxS23mAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Interest not allowable in respect of debts owed to person(s) not subject to tax (s23M) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: limitationOfInterestDeductionS23nAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Limitation of interest deduction under s23N (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2014 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossAdjustmentS24iAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Foreign exchange loss adjustment (s24I) (excluding s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossAdjustmentDebtS24iAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Foreign exchange loss adjustment relating to debt (s24I(4)) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: foreignCurrencyTranslationAdjustmentS25dAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Foreign currency translation adjustment (s25D) (R)

fields.name: financialAssistanceS31AddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Financial assistance (s31) (R)

fields.name: transferPricingAdjustmentsExcludingThinCapAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Transfer pricing adjustments (excluding thin capitalisation adjustments) (R)

fields.name: sarsInterestRepaidS7fAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — SARS interest repaid (s7F) (R)

fields.name: expenditureAttributableIssueOfSharesOptionsS40cAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Expenditure attributable to the issue of shares or granting of option or rights for no consideration (s40C) (R)

fields.name: capitalImprovementFarmingOperationsAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Capital Improvement — Farming operations (paragraph 12 of the First Schedule) (R)

fields.name: otherAddBack
fields.label: Credit adjustment — Other (excluding items listed above) (R)

fields.name: otherAddBackDescription
fields.label: Description relating to 'other' credit adjustments consolidated above
fields.description: Free text, maximum 150 characters. Only completed if a value exceeding R0 was entered in otherAddBack; on eFiling/branch, only displays if 'Other' was checked on the selection list.

fields.name: imputedNetIncomeFromCfc
fields.label: Imputed net income from Controlled Foreign Company (CFC) (R)
fields.description: Source code 4276. Unlike the SARS-calculated 'Calculated profit/loss excluding net income from CFC' lines in this subsection (§14.2.26(c)), this line is filer-entered.

documents.label: Annual Financial Statements (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Notes to the AFS)
documents.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §9(c) — 'For Small Businesses and Medium to Large Businesses... submission of signed off supporting Annual Financial Statement (AFS) is compulsory. For all other companies, it is optional.'

documents.label: Group organogram showing the Group Structure
documents.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §14.2.17(c)(ii) — 'Ensure that the group organogram with the correct information of the Group Structure is uploaded as supporting documents with the submission of the return.'

documents.label: Farming schedule
documents.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §14.2.9(a)(ix)(vii)(B)(I) — 'Please upload the required farming schedule as part of your return submission.'

documents.label: Declaration
documents.statement: The ITR14 return is a legal declaration to SARS and by signing you agree that the information is accurate. You are obliged to ensure that a full and accurate disclosure is made of all relevant information as required in the ITR14 return. Misrepresentation, omission or negligence in submitting a declaration or supplying false information may result in prosecution.
